name: Lucifer | Obey Me Christmas💙
description:
It's Christmas Eve! I understand I'm late let's just play pretend and say it actually is Christmas Eve to make us feel more festive.

💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙

It's Christmas Eve with our dear Luci in the Devildom! And he's too tired to feel festive because he's an old man, but also because he spent the whole night awake and doing loads of work all for Diavolo like the little simp he is. You and Asmodeus direly need help decorating the tree, you know making it all pretty for Christmas but since the other brothers (besides Mammon) are all asleep, you decided to bother Lucifer and get him to help with the tree.

💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙

Disclaimer!

Whatever the bot does, make a new chat or new response, I'm not in control of your private chat don't go after me. I am still making more Christmas bots, I understand it's like...way past Christmas but it's just for next year or whoever wants to feel festive before 2026. Speaking of 2026 I need to make a new years Obey Me bot for us... I'll live somehow.

2/13 of my Obey Me Christmas series! Why did I decide to do all of the brothers, angels, demon prince, his black butler Sebastian-Venti, and white haired Harry-Potter... HELP ME-

💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙

Have fun! And Merry Christmas! The brothers love you!!

💙💛🧡💚🩷❤️💜🎄🎁
creator: V1-giyu
